pkgmetadata.longdescription: Lemonade is a local LLM inference platform built on the Lemonade SDK. It provides a server daemon (lemond), a command-line client, and an optional web interface. Supports multiple backends including CUDA, OpenCL, and Vulkan for efficient model deployment.

use.flag: Build the bundled web application frontend
Link against libsystemd for journal log support and install the lemond.service unit file
